paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning

raw_extraction.innovation: Flamingo introduces a visual language model that combines a pretrained vision encoder with a frozen large language model using GATED XATTN-DENSE layers to condition text generation on interleaved visual and textual data, enabling few-shot learning without fine-tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: M3W (interleaved image-text dataset), ALIGN, LTIP (Long Text & Image Pairs), VTP (Video & Text Pairs)
raw_extraction.application: Visual question answering, image captioning, visual dialogue, closed-ended and open-ended image understanding tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling rapid adaptation to novel vision-language tasks with minimal annotated data
raw_extraction.extension: GATED XATTN-DENSE layers allow the frozen language model to conditionally attend to visual representations while preserving pretrained knowledge during initialization
raw_extraction.paper_title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning
